mapper.select: SELECT c.before_code, c.before_name, c.after_code, c.after_name, CASE WHEN c.before_code = c.after_code THEN 'Y1' ELSE NVL(w.is_allow, 'Y0') END as is_allow, #{roleId} as role_id, #{typeId} as type_id, #{conditionType} as condition_type FROM (SELECT c1.com_value as before_code, c1.com_name as before_name, c2.com_value as after_code, c2.com_name as after_name FROM common_code c1 CROSS JOIN common_code c2 WHERE c1.group_value = '0Q' AND c2.group_value = '0Q' ) c LEFT OUTER JOIN workflow w ON c.before_code = w.before AND c.after_code = w.after AND w.role_id = #{roleId} AND w.type_id = #{typeId} AND w.condition_type =#{conditionType} ORDER BY c.before_code, c.after_code
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM workflow WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND type_id = #{typeId} AND condition_type = #{conditionType}
mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('task_type') FROM dual
INSERT INTO task_type (id, name, default_status, description) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{defaultStatus}, #{description}
mapper.select: SELECT com_value as "key", com_name as "label" FROM common_code WHERE group_value = #{groupValue} AND is_use = 1 ORDER BY com_value
